channel.title: Management on The Blog of Lukas Andersen
channel.description: Recent content in Management on The Blog of Lukas Andersen

item.title: On Building a Foundation
item.description: Testing the foundation The Mission Witihin the next 5 years I will: Establish myself as a thought leader in the field of technology leadership by regularly publishing 2 blog posts a month, or even creating videos and starting a podcast. While sharing this content on social media and relevant forums. Found a networking platform focused on technology leadership Speak at 3 major industry conferences Obtain a patent in a cutting-edge technology Establish a non-profit for increasing access to technology for underprivileged talent
